description.pt:
Agilize a criação de coberturas complexas transformando qualquer face em telhados de múltiplos níveis com precisão técnica. Esta ferramenta automatiza o cálculo de inclinação e offset, eliminando a modelagem manual exaustiva de águas de telhado.

Principais Funcionalidades:
- Geração Instantânea: Cria estruturas de telhado a partir de uma face selecionada com um único clique.
- Controle de Níveis: Ajuste a quantidade de níveis da cobertura em tempo real usando as setas do teclado.
- Parametrização Dinâmica: Defina inclinação em porcentagem (%) e offset inicial diretamente via digitação.
description.en:
Streamline the creation of complex roofs by transforming any face into multi-level roofs with technical precision. This tool automates slope and offset calculations, eliminating the need for exhaustive manual roof pitch modeling.

Key Features:
- Instant Generation: Creates roof structures from a selected face with a single click.
- Level Control: Adjust the number of roof levels in real time using the keyboard arrows.
- Dynamic Parameterization: Define slope as a percentage (%) and initial offset directly by typing.
description.es:
Optimice la creación de techos complejos transformando cualquier cara en techos multinivel con precisión técnica. Esta herramienta automatiza los cálculos de pendiente y desnivel, eliminando la necesidad de un modelado manual exhaustivo de la inclinación del techo.

Características principales:
- Generación instantánea: Crea estructuras de techo a partir de una cara seleccionada con un solo clic.
- Control de nivel: Ajuste el número de niveles del techo en tiempo real con las flechas del teclado.
- Parametrización dinámica: Defina la pendiente como porcentaje (%) y el desnivel inicial directamente escribiendo.

code.pt:
# ==================================================
# SCRIPT: Pirâmide Sólida / Telhado Ajustável
# Padrão: ScriptUp (Multi-Idioma)
# ==================================================
require 'sketchup.rb'

module ScriptUpComunidade
  module UniversalRoofTool

    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        :select_face_initial => "Selecione uma face para criar o telhado.",
        :click_base => "Clique para selecionar a base.",
        :select_face_short => "Selecione uma face.",
        :click_confirm => "Clique para confirmar. Digite: '200' (Offset), '30%' (Inclinação), '5n' (Níveis).",
        :hud_info => "Níveis: %{current}/%{max}\nOffset: %{offset}\nInclinação: %{slope}%\n[Setas] Níveis | Digite [valor], [%] ou[Nn]",
        :invalid_input => "Entrada inválida. Tente algo como 150mm, 30% ou 5n.",
        :generate_roof_op => "Gerar Telhado",
        :prompt_offset => "Offset Inicial:",
        :prompt_slope => "Inclinação (%):",
        :tool_title => "Gerador de Telhado"
      },
      'en-US' => {
        :select_face_initial => "Select a face to create the roof.",
        :click_base => "Click to select the base.",
        :select_face_short => "Select a face.",
        :click_confirm => "Click to confirm. Type: '200' (Offset), '30%' (Slope), '5n' (Levels).",
        :hud_info => "Levels: %{current}/%{max}\nOffset: %{offset}\nSlope: %{slope}%\n[Arrows] Levels | Type [value], [%] or [Nn]",
        :invalid_input => "Invalid input. Try something like 150mm, 30% or 5n.",
        :generate_roof_op => "Generate Roof",
        :prompt_offset => "Initial Offset:",
        :prompt_slope => "Slope (%):",
        :tool_title => "Roof Generator"
      },
      'es' => {
        :select_face_initial => "Seleccione una cara para crear el techo.",
        :click_base => "Haga clic para seleccionar la base.",
        :select_face_short => "Seleccione una cara.",
        :click_confirm => "Haga clic para confirmar. Escriba: '200' (Desfase), '30%' (Pendiente), '5n' (Niveles).",
        :hud_info => "Niveles: %{current}/%{max}\nDesfase: %{offset}\nPendiente: %{slope}%\n[Flechas] Niveles | Escriba [valor], [%] o [Nn]",
        :invalid_input => "Entrada inválida. Pruebe algo como 150mm, 30% o 5n.",
        :generate_roof_op => "Generar Techo",
        :prompt_offset => "Desfase Inicial:",
        :prompt_slope => "Pendiente (%):",
        :tool_title => "Generador de Techo"
      }
    }

    def self.obter_texto(chave)
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
    end

    class RoofTool
      STATE_PICK = 0 unless defined?(STATE_PICK)
      STATE_EDIT = 1 unless defined?(STATE_EDIT)
      
      COLOR_PREVIEW = Sketchup::Color.new(255, 165, 0) unless defined?(COLOR_PREVIEW)
      COLOR_PICK    = Sketchup::Color.new(0, 0, 255)   unless defined?(COLOR_PICK)
      
      def initialize(offset, slope_percent)
        @model = Sketchup.active_model
        @offset = offset
        @slope_percent = slope_percent
        
        @max_possible_levels = 0
        @current_levels = 0
        
        @state = STATE_PICK
        @ip = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
        @hover_face = nil
        
        @base_points_2d =[]
        @tr_world = nil
        @tr_local = nil
        @face_normal = nil
        @face_material = nil
        
        @draw_points =[]
        
        update_ui
      end

      def activate
        @model.active_view.invalidate
      end

      def deactivate(view)
        view.invalidate
      end

      def resume(view)
        update_ui
        view.invalidate
      end

      # --- EVENTOS DO MOUSE ---

      def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
        if @state == STATE_PICK
          @ip.pick(view, x, y)
          face = @ip.face
          
          if face != @hover_face
            @hover_face = face
            view.invalidate
          end
          
          msg = @hover_face ? UniversalRoofTool.obter_texto(:click_base) : UniversalRoofTool.obter_texto(:select_face_short)
          Sketchup.set_status_text(msg)
        end
      end

      def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view)
        if @state == STATE_PICK
          if @hover_face
            initialize_geometry(@hover_face)
            recalculate_max_levels
            @state = STATE_EDIT
            calculate_preview_geometry
            update_ui
            view.invalidate
          else
            UI.beep
          end
        elsif @state == STATE_EDIT
          generate_geometry
          @model.select_tool(nil)
        end
      end

      # --- EVENTOS DE TECLADO E VCB ---

      def onKeyDown(key, repeat, flags, view)
        return unless @state == STATE_EDIT
        
        case key
        when 38, 63232 # UP (Windows/Mac)
          if @current_levels < @max_possible_levels
            @current_levels += 1
            calculate_preview_geometry
            view.invalidate
          else
            UI.beep 
          end
        when 40, 63233 # DOWN (Windows/Mac)
          if @current_levels > 1
            @current_levels -= 1
            calculate_preview_geometry
            view.invalidate
          end
        end
      end

      def onUserText(text, view)
        return unless @state == STATE_EDIT
        
        begin
          text.strip!
          if text.end_with?('%')
            @slope_percent = text.to_f
          elsif text.downcase.end_with?('n', 'l')
            val = text.to_i
            @current_levels = [[val, @max_possible_levels].min, 1].max
          else
            @offset = text.to_l
            recalculate_max_levels 
          end
          
          calculate_preview_geometry
          update_ui
          view.invalidate
        rescue ArgumentError
          UI.beep
          puts UniversalRoofTool.obter_texto(:invalid_input)
        end
      end

      # --- PREPARAÇÃO GEOMÉTRICA ---

      def initialize_geometry(face)
        @face_normal = face.normal
        @face_center = face.bounds.center
        @face_material = face.material
        
        xaxis = @face_normal.axes[0]
        yaxis = @face_normal.axes[1]
        origin = face.vertices[0].position
        
        @tr_local = Geom::Transformation.axes(origin, xaxis, yaxis, @face_normal).inverse
        @tr_world = @tr_local.inverse
        
        raw_points = face.outer_loop.vertices.map { |v| v.position.transform(@tr_local) }
        cleaned_points = clean_polygon(raw_points)
        
        @base_points_2d = ensure_ccw(cleaned_points)
      end

      def recalculate_max_levels
        pts = @base_points_2d
        count = 0
        limit_safety = 500 
        
        loop do
          count += 1
          return if count > limit_safety
          
          current_area = signed_area(pts)
          next_pts = offset_polygon_by_intersection(pts, @offset)
          
          break if next_pts.nil? || next_pts.length < 3
          
          next_area = signed_area(next_pts)
          break if next_area <= 0.001 || next_area >= current_area
          
          pts = next_pts
        end
        
        @max_possible_levels = count
        @current_levels = count
      end

      # --- DESENHO EM TELA (PREVIEW) ---

      def draw(view)
        view.line_width = 2
        
        if @state == STATE_PICK && @hover_face
          view.drawing_color = COLOR_PICK
          pts = @hover_face.outer_loop.vertices.map { |v| v.position }
          pts << pts.first 
          view.draw(GL_LINE_STRIP, pts)
        elsif @state == STATE_EDIT
          view.drawing_color = COLOR_PREVIEW
          view.draw(GL_LINES, @draw_points) if @draw_points.any?
          draw_info_text(view)
        end
      end
      
      def draw_info_text(view)
        return unless @face_center
        pt2d = view.screen_coords(@face_center)
        
        pt2d.x += 15; pt2d.y += 15 
        
        msg = UniversalRoofTool.obter_texto(:hud_info) % {
          current: @current_levels,
          max: @max_possible_levels,
          offset: Sketchup.format_length(@offset),
          slope: @slope_percent
        }
        
        view.draw_text(pt2d, msg, size: 10, color: "black", bold: true)
      end

      def update_ui
        if @state == STATE_PICK
          Sketchup.set_status_text(UniversalRoofTool.obter_texto(:select_face_initial))
        else
          Sketchup.set_status_text(UniversalRoofTool.obter_texto(:click_confirm))
        end
      end

      def calculate_preview_geometry
        @draw_points.clear
        current_pts_2d = @base_points_2d
        current_z = 0.0
        step_height = (@offset * @slope_percent) / 100.0

        add_loop_to_draw(current_pts_2d, current_z)

        @current_levels.times do 
          next_pts_2d = offset_polygon_by_intersection(current_pts_2d, @offset)
          break if next_pts_2d.nil? || next_pts_2d.length < 3
          
          next_z = current_z + step_height
          
          add_loop_to_draw(next_pts_2d, next_z)
          add_verticals_to_draw(current_pts_2d, next_pts_2d, current_z, next_z)
          
          current_pts_2d = next_pts_2d
          current_z = next_z
        end
      end

      def add_loop_to_draw(pts_2d, z)
        pts_3d = pts_2d.map { |p| Geom::Point3d.new(p.x, p.y, z).transform(@tr_world) }
        pts_3d.each_with_index do |pt, i|
          @draw_points << pt
          @draw_points << pts_3d[(i + 1) % pts_3d.length]
        end
      end
      
      def add_verticals_to_draw(pts_bot, pts_top, z_bot, z_top)
        limit = [pts_bot.length, pts_top.length].min
        (0...limit).each do |i|
          p1 = Geom::Point3d.new(pts_bot[i].x, pts_bot[i].y, z_bot).transform(@tr_world)
          p2 = Geom::Point3d.new(pts_top[i].x, pts_top[i].y, z_top).transform(@tr_world)
          @draw_points << p1 << p2
        end
      end

      # --- GERAÇÃO DO SÓLIDO (GEOMETRIA 3D) ---

      def generate_geometry
        @model.start_operation(UniversalRoofTool.obter_texto(:generate_roof_op), true)
        
        roof_group = @model.active_entities.add_group
        ent = roof_group.entities
        
        current_pts_2d = @base_points_2d
        current_z = 0.0
        step_height = (@offset * @slope_percent) / 100.0
        
        # 1. BASE
        base_pts_3d = current_pts_2d.map { |p| Geom::Point3d.new(p.x, p.y, 0).transform(@tr_world) }
        safe_add_face(ent, base_pts_3d, @face_normal)
        
        current_pts_3d = base_pts_3d
        last_valid_pts_3d = current_pts_3d
        
        # 2. LATERAIS
        @current_levels.times do
          next_pts_2d = offset_polygon_by_intersection(current_pts_2d, @offset)
          break if next_pts_2d.nil? || next_pts_2d.length < 3 
          
          next_z = current_z + step_height
          next_pts_3d = next_pts_2d.map { |p| Geom::Point3d.new(p.x, p.y, next_z).transform(@tr_world) }
          
          create_side_faces(ent, current_pts_3d, next_pts_3d)
          
          current_pts_2d = next_pts_2d
          current_pts_3d = next_pts_3d
          last_valid_pts_3d = next_pts_3d
          current_z = next_z
        end
        
        # 3. TOPO (Tampa)
        if last_valid_pts_3d && last_valid_pts_3d.length >= 3
          safe_add_face(ent, last_valid_pts_3d, @face_normal.reverse)
        end
        
        @model.commit_operation
      end

      def safe_add_face(entities, points, reference_normal)
        begin
          face = entities.add_face(points)
          if face
            face.material = @face_material
            face.back_material = @face_material
            face.reverse! if face.normal.dot(reference_normal) > 0 
          end
        rescue ArgumentError
          # Ignora silenciosamente
        end
      end

      def create_side_faces(entities, pts_bottom, pts_top)
        n = [pts_bottom.length, pts_top.length].min
        (0...n).each do |i|
          p1 = pts_bottom[i]
          p2 = pts_bottom[(i + 1) % n]
          p3 = pts_top[(i + 1) % n]
          p4 = pts_top[i]
          
          begin
            f = entities.add_face(p1, p2, p3, p4)
            f.material = f.back_material = @face_material
            
            vec_center = p1.vector_to(bounds_center(pts_bottom))
            f.reverse! if f.normal.dot(vec_center) > 0
          rescue ArgumentError
            f1 = (entities.add_face(p1, p2, p3) rescue nil)
            f2 = (entities.add_face(p1, p3, p4) rescue nil)
            
            [f1, f2].compact.each do |face|
              face.material = face.back_material = @face_material
              vec_center = p1.vector_to(bounds_center(pts_bottom))
              face.reverse! if face.normal.dot(vec_center) > 0
            end
          end
        end
      end

      # --- MATEMÁTICA E UTILIDADES ---
      
      def clean_polygon(pts)
        return pts if pts.length < 3
        cleaned =[]
        n = pts.length
        
        (0...n).each do |i|
          p_prev = pts[(i - 1) % n]
          p_curr = pts[i]
          p_next = pts[(i + 1) % n]
          
          v1 = p_prev.vector_to(p_curr)
          v2 = p_curr.vector_to(p_next)
          
          if v1.valid? && v2.valid?
            if v1.normalize.cross(v2.normalize).length > 0.001
              cleaned << p_curr
            end
          end
        end
        
        cleaned.length >= 3 ? cleaned : pts
      end

      def offset_polygon_by_intersection(points, dist)
        n = points.length
        return nil if n < 3
        
        offset_lines =[]
        
        (0...n).each do |i|
          p1 = points[i]
          p2 = points[(i + 1) % n]
          vec = p1.vector_to(p2)
          return nil unless vec.valid?
          vec.normalize!
          
          perp = Geom::Vector3d.new(-vec.y, vec.x, 0)
          offset_lines <<[p1.offset(perp, dist), vec]
        end

        new_pts =[]
        (0...n).each do |i|
          l1 = offset_lines[(i - 1) % n]
          l2 = offset_lines[i]
          
          pt = Geom.intersect_line_line(l1, l2)
          
          if pt.nil?
            vec = l2[1]
            perp = Geom::Vector3d.new(-vec.y, vec.x, 0)
            pt = points[i].offset(perp, dist)
          end
          
          new_pts << pt
        end
        new_pts
      end

      def ensure_ccw(points)
        signed_area(points) < 0 ? points.reverse : points
      end

      def signed_area(pts)
        area = 0.0
        n = pts.length
        (0...n).each { |i| area += (pts[i].x * pts[(i + 1) % n].y - pts[(i + 1) % n].x * pts[i].y) }
        area / 2.0
      end

      def bounds_center(pts)
        bb = Geom::BoundingBox.new
        pts.each { |p| bb.add(p) }
        bb.center
      end
    end

    def self.executar
      prompts =[obter_texto(:prompt_offset), obter_texto(:prompt_slope)]
      defaults =[150.mm.to_s, "20"] 
      
      inputs = UI.inputbox(prompts, defaults, obter_texto(:tool_title))
      return unless inputs

      offset = inputs[0].to_l
      slope_percent = inputs[1].to_f

      Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(RoofTool.new(offset, slope_percent))
    end

  end
end

ScriptUpComunidade::UniversalRoofTool.executar

description.pt:
Automatiza a criação de telhados complexos e tramas estruturais diretamente no SketchUp. Ele elimina o trabalho manual de calcular inclinações e desenhar caibros, permitindo gerar coberturas de meia água, duas águas ou quatro águas com apenas alguns cliques.

Principais Funcionalidades:
- Gera automaticamente geometrias de Meia Água, Duas Águas e Quatro Águas a partir de três pontos de referência.
- Cria vigas e caibros em série sobre qualquer face selecionada, com controle total de espaçamento e dimensões.
- Permite definir a inclinação (porcentagem) e alternar a direção da queda d'água usando as setas do teclado durante a criação.
- Todos os elementos gerados são automaticamente agrupados e nomeados com padrões BIM (ex: Telhado_Gable, Viga_Trama), facilitando a gestão do modelo e orçamentação.
description.en:
Automates the creation of complex roofs and structural frameworks directly in SketchUp. It eliminates the manual work of calculating slopes and drawing rafters, allowing you to generate gable, double-pitched, or hip roofs with just a few clicks.

Key Features:
- Automatically generates Gable, Double-pitched, and Hip geometries from three reference points.
- Creates beams and rafters in series on any selected face, with full control over spacing and dimensions.
- Allows you to define the slope (percentage) and change the direction of the water runoff using the keyboard arrows during creation.
- All generated elements are automatically grouped and named with BIM standards (e.g., Roof_Gable, Beam_Frame), facilitating model management and budgeting.
description.es:
Automatiza la creación de techos complejos y estructuras directamente en SketchUp. Elimina el trabajo manual de calcular pendientes y dibujar vigas, lo que permite generar techos a dos aguas, a dos aguas o a cuatro aguas con solo unos clics.

Características principales:
- Genera automáticamente geometrías de techos a dos aguas, a dos aguas y a cuatro aguas a partir de tres puntos de referencia.
- Crea vigas y vigas en serie en cualquier cara seleccionada, con control total sobre el espaciado y las dimensiones.
- Permite definir la pendiente (porcentaje) y cambiar la dirección de la escorrentía con las flechas del teclado durante la creación.
- Todos los elementos generados se agrupan y nombran automáticamente según los estándares BIM (p. ej., Techo_A dos aguas, Viga_Marco), lo que facilita la gestión de modelos y la elaboración de presupuestos.

code.pt:
# encoding: utf-8
require 'sketchup.rb'

# Remove modulo anterior da memoria para evitar conflitos de heranca
if defined?(ScriptUpComunidade::RoofMaster)
  ScriptUpComunidade.send(:remove_const, :RoofMaster)
end

module ScriptUpComunidade
  module RoofMaster

    # ==========================================================
    # DICIONARIO MULTI-IDIOMA
    # ==========================================================
    IDIOMAS = {
      'pt-BR' => {
        # Status bar — 3 passos por ferramenta
        :status_duas_aguas_p1   => "Duas Aguas: Clique no ponto de ORIGEM.",
        :status_duas_aguas_p2   => "Duas Aguas: Clique no ponto do PRIMEIRO LADO (comprimento).",
        :status_duas_aguas_p3   => "Duas Aguas: Clique para definir a LARGURA.",
        :status_meia_agua_p1    => "Meia Agua: Clique no ponto de ORIGEM.",
        :status_meia_agua_p2    => "Meia Agua: Clique no ponto do PRIMEIRO LADO.",
        :status_meia_agua_p3    => "Meia Agua: Clique para definir a LARGURA. Setas mudam a queda.",
        :status_quatro_aguas_p1 => "Quatro Aguas: Clique no ponto de ORIGEM.",
        :status_quatro_aguas_p2 => "Quatro Aguas: Clique no ponto do PRIMEIRO LADO.",
        :status_quatro_aguas_p3 => "Quatro Aguas: Clique para definir a LARGURA.",
        :status_trama_face      => "Trama: Selecione a FACE.",
        :status_trama_edge      => "Trama: Selecione a ARESTA de referencia.",
        # Erros
        :error_select_edge      => "Clique em uma aresta da face selecionada!",
        :error_invalid_geom     => "Erro: Geometria invalida ou fora dos limites.",
        # Viewport
        :draw_divisions         => "Divisoes: %{divs} | Clique para configurar",
        # Nomes das operacoes (Undo)
        :op_duas_aguas          => "Telhado Duas Aguas",
        :op_meia_agua           => "Meia Agua",
        :op_quatro_aguas        => "4 Aguas",
        :op_trama               => "Trama Telhado",
        # Nomes BIM dos grupos
        :bim_duas_aguas         => "Telhado_Duas_Aguas",
        :bim_meia_agua          => "Telhado_Meia_Agua",
        :bim_quatro_aguas       => "Telhado_Quatro_Aguas",
        :bim_trama_master       => "Estrutura_Telhado",
        :bim_trama_viga         => "Viga_Trama",
        # Dialog Trama
        :dialog_trama_title     => "Configurar Trama",
        :dialog_trama_spacing   => "Espacamento:",
        :dialog_trama_height    => "Altura da Viga:",
        :dialog_trama_thick     => "Espessura da Viga:",
        # Interface HTML
        :html_title             => "Roof Master",
        :html_select_tool       => "Selecione a Ferramenta",
        :html_slope_label       => "Inclinacao:",
        :html_slope_unit        => "%",
        :html_hint              => "Ret. 3 pontos -- origem > comprimento > largura",
        :html_meia_title        => "Meia Agua",
        :html_meia_desc         => "Setas do teclado mudam a direcao da queda.",
        :html_duas_title        => "Duas Aguas",
        :html_duas_desc         => "Setas do teclado giram a cumeeira.",
        :html_quatro_title      => "Quatro Aguas",
        :html_quatro_desc       => "Bordas convergentes para o centro.",
        :html_trama_title       => "Trama do Telhado",
        :html_trama_desc        => "Divide uma face criando vigas em serie.",
      },

      'en-US' => {
        :status_duas_aguas_p1   => "Gable Roof: Click the ORIGIN point.",
        :status_duas_aguas_p2   => "Gable Roof: Click the FIRST SIDE point (length).",
        :status_duas_aguas_p3   => "Gable Roof: Click to set the WIDTH.",
        :status_meia_agua_p1    => "Shed Roof: Click the ORIGIN point.",
        :status_meia_agua_p2    => "Shed Roof: Click the FIRST SIDE point.",
        :status_meia_agua_p3    => "Shed Roof: Click to set WIDTH. Arrow keys change slope.",
        :status_quatro_aguas_p1 => "Hip Roof: Click the ORIGIN point.",
        :status_quatro_aguas_p2 => "Hip Roof: Click the FIRST SIDE point.",

    def self.obter_texto(chave)
      locale = Sketchup.get_locale
      lang   = IDIOMAS.key?(locale) ? locale : 'en-US'
      IDIOMAS[lang][chave] || IDIOMAS['en-US'][chave] || chave.to_s
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # MODULO DE UTILIDADES GEOMETRICAS
    # ==========================================================
    module RoofUtils

      # Retorna hash com cantos do retangulo 3-pontos no plano Z=base.
      # Layout: c0=origem, c1=c0+v_len, c2=c1+v_perp*w, c3=c0+v_perp*w
      # v_perp sempre aponta na direcao real da largura (sinal correto).
      def calcular_cantos_3pt(pt0, pt1, pt_width)
        vx  = pt1.x - pt0.x
        vy  = pt1.y - pt0.y
        len = Math.sqrt(vx*vx + vy*vy)
        return nil if len < 1e-6

        v_len  = Geom::Vector3d.new(vx/len, vy/len, 0)
        perp_x = -vy/len
        perp_y =  vx/len

        dx           = pt_width.x - pt0.x
        dy           = pt_width.y - pt0.y
        width_signed = dx*perp_x + dy*perp_y
        return nil if width_signed.abs < 1e-6

        sign   = width_signed >= 0 ? 1.0 : -1.0
        v_perp = Geom::Vector3d.new(perp_x * sign, perp_y * sign, 0)
        w      = width_signed.abs
        z      = pt0.z

        { corners: [
            Geom::Point3d.new(pt0.x,               pt0.y,               z),
            Geom::Point3d.new(pt1.x,               pt1.y,               z),
            Geom::Point3d.new(pt1.x + v_perp.x*w,  pt1.y + v_perp.y*w,  z),
            Geom::Point3d.new(pt0.x + v_perp.x*w,  pt0.y + v_perp.y*w,  z)
          ],
          v_len:  v_len,
          v_perp: v_perp,
          length: len,
          width:  w }
      end

      # Adiciona face removendo pontos duplicados consecutivos.
      def add_face_safe(ents, *pts)
        pts     = pts.flatten
        cleaned = [pts[0]]
        pts[1..].each { |p| cleaned << p if cleaned.last.distance(p) > 1e-6 }
        cleaned.pop if cleaned.length > 2 && cleaned.last.distance(cleaned.first) < 1e-6
        return nil if cleaned.length < 3
        begin; ents.add_face(cleaned); rescue; nil; end
      end

      # Adiciona face e orienta a normal para FORA do centro do solido.
      def add_face_outward(ents, pts, center)
        f = add_face_safe(ents, pts)
        return unless f
        outward = center.vector_to(f.bounds.center)
        f.reverse! if outward.valid? && f.normal.dot(outward) < 0
        f
      end

      # Adiciona face e garante normal apontando para BAIXO (base do telhado).
      def add_base_face(ents, pts)
        f = add_face_safe(ents, pts)
        return unless f
        f.reverse! if f.normal.z > 0
        f
      end

      # Remove arestas coplanares resultantes da criacao das faces.
      def finalizar_solido(group)
        coplanar = group.entities.grep(Sketchup::Edge).select do |e|
          e.faces.length == 2 &&
            e.faces[0].normal.angle_between(e.faces[1].normal) < 0.01
        end
        group.entities.erase_entities(coplanar) unless coplanar.empty?
      end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # FERRAMENTA BASE -- RETANGULO 3 PONTOS
    # Gerencia os 3 cliques e o preview; subclasses implementam
    # draw_roof_preview / criar_telhado.
    # ==========================================================
    class Base3PtRoofTool
      include RoofUtils

      def initialize(inclinacao)
        @inclinacao = inclinacao / 100.0
        @ip1        = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
        @ip2        = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
        @ip3        = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
        @pt1        = nil  # origem (fixo apos 1 clique)
        @pt2        = nil  # fim do 1 lado (fixo apos 2 clique)
        @estado     = 0    # 0=aguarda pt1 | 1=aguarda pt2 | 2=aguarda pt3
      end

      def activate;  update_status; end

      def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
        case @estado
        when 0 then @ip1.pick(view, x, y)
        when 1 then @ip2.pick(view, x, y, @ip1)
        when 2 then @ip3.pick(view, x, y, @ip2)
        end
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view)
        case @estado
        when 0
          @ip1.pick(view, x, y)
          if @ip1.valid?
            @pt1 = @ip1.position; @estado = 1
          end
        when 1
          @ip2.pick(view, x, y, @ip1)
          if @ip2.valid? && @ip2.position.distance(@pt1) > 1e-4
            @pt2 = @ip2.position; @estado = 2
          end
        when 2
          @ip3.pick(view, x, y, @ip2)
          if @ip3.valid?
            rect = calcular_cantos_3pt(@pt1, @pt2, @ip3.position)
            criar_telhado(rect) if rect && rect[:width] > 1e-4
            Sketchup.active_model.select_tool(nil)
          end
        end
        update_status
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onKeyDown(key, repeat, flags, view)
        on_key(key, view); view.invalidate
      end

      def draw(view)
        case @estado
        when 0
          @ip1.draw(view)
        when 1
          @ip2.draw(view)
          if @pt1
            view.line_width = 2; view.drawing_color = '#2563eb'
            view.draw(GL_LINES, [@pt1, @ip2.position])
          end
        when 2
          @ip3.draw(view)
          rect = calcular_cantos_3pt(@pt1, @pt2, @ip3.position)
          if rect
            view.line_width = 2; view.drawing_color = '#2563eb'
            view.draw(GL_LINE_LOOP, rect[:corners])
            draw_roof_preview(view, rect)
          end
        end
      end

      # Hooks para subclasses
      def on_key(key, view);          end
      def update_status;              end
      def draw_roof_preview(v, rect); end
      def criar_telhado(rect);        end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # TELHADO DUAS AGUAS (Gable)
    # ==========================================================
    class TelhadoDuasAguasTool < Base3PtRoofTool

      def initialize(inclinacao)
        super
        @eixo = 0  # 0=cumeeira paralela a v_len | 1=paralela a v_perp
      end

      def update_status
        chaves = %i[status_duas_aguas_p1 status_duas_aguas_p2 status_duas_aguas_p3]
        Sketchup.set_status_text(RoofMaster.obter_texto(chaves[@estado]))
      end

      def on_key(key, view)
        @eixo ^= 1 if [VK_UP, VK_DOWN, VK_LEFT, VK_RIGHT].include?(key)
      end

      # eixo=0 -> cume no meio da LARGURA (entre c0-c3 e c1-c2)
      # eixo=1 -> cume no meio do COMPRIMENTO (entre c0-c1 e c3-c2)
      def calcular_cume(rect)
        c = rect[:corners]
        if @eixo == 0
          h   = (rect[:width]  / 2.0) * @inclinacao
          cm1 = Geom::Point3d.new((c[0].x+c[3].x)/2.0, (c[0].y+c[3].y)/2.0, c[0].z+h)
          cm2 = Geom::Point3d.new((c[1].x+c[2].x)/2.0, (c[1].y+c[2].y)/2.0, c[1].z+h)
        else
          h   = (rect[:length] / 2.0) * @inclinacao
          cm1 = Geom::Point3d.new((c[0].x+c[1].x)/2.0, (c[0].y+c[1].y)/2.0, c[0].z+h)
          cm2 = Geom::Point3d.new((c[3].x+c[2].x)/2.0, (c[3].y+c[2].y)/2.0, c[3].z+h)
        end
        [cm1, cm2]
      end

      def draw_roof_preview(view, rect)
        cm1, cm2 = calcular_cume(rect)
        c        = rect[:corners]
        view.draw(GL_LINES, [cm1, cm2])
        if @eixo == 0
          view.draw(GL_LINES, [c[0], cm1, c[3], cm1, c[1], cm2, c[2], cm2])
        else
          view.draw(GL_LINES, [c[0], cm1, c[1], cm1, c[3], cm2, c[2], cm2])
        end
      end

      def criar_telhado(rect)
        c        = rect[:corners]
        cm1, cm2 = calcular_cume(rect)
        center   = Geom::Point3d.new(
          (c[0].x+c[2].x)/2.0, (c[0].y+c[2].y)/2.0,
          c[0].z + (cm1.z - c[0].z) / 2.0
        )

        model = Sketchup.active_model
        model.start_operation(RoofMaster.obter_texto(:op_duas_aguas), true)
        grp = model.active_entities.add_group
        grp.name = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:bim_duas_aguas)
        ents = grp.entities

        add_base_face(ents, c)

        if @eixo == 0
          # Rampas nos lados da largura; triangulos nas extremidades do comprimento
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], c[1], cm2, cm1], center)  # rampa frente
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[3], cm1, cm2, c[2]], center)  # rampa costas
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], cm1, c[3]],      center)  # triangulo esq
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[1], c[2], cm2],      center)  # triangulo dir
        else
          # Rampas nos lados do comprimento; triangulos nas extremidades da largura
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], c[3], cm2, cm1], center)  # rampa esq
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[1], cm1, cm2, c[2]], center)  # rampa dir
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], c[1], cm1],      center)  # triangulo frente
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[3], c[2], cm2],      center)  # triangulo costas
        end

        finalizar_solido(grp)
        model.commit_operation
      end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # TELHADO MEIA AGUA (Shed)
    # ==========================================================
    class TelhadoUmaAguaTool < Base3PtRoofTool

      def initialize(inclinacao)
        super
        @lado = 0  # 0=c2,c3 sobem | 1=c1,c2 sobem | 2=c0,c1 sobem | 3=c0,c3 sobem
      end

      def update_status
        chaves = %i[status_meia_agua_p1 status_meia_agua_p2 status_meia_agua_p3]
        Sketchup.set_status_text(RoofMaster.obter_texto(chaves[@estado]))
      end

      def on_key(key, view)
        @lado = 0 if key == VK_UP
        @lado = 1 if key == VK_RIGHT
        @lado = 2 if key == VK_DOWN
        @lado = 3 if key == VK_LEFT
      end

      def calcular_topo(rect)
        c = rect[:corners]
        t = c.map { |p| Geom::Point3d.new(p.x, p.y, p.z) }
        case @lado
        when 0; h = rect[:width]  * @inclinacao; t[2].z += h; t[3].z += h
        when 1; h = rect[:length] * @inclinacao; t[1].z += h; t[2].z += h
        when 2; h = rect[:width]  * @inclinacao; t[0].z += h; t[1].z += h
        when 3; h = rect[:length] * @inclinacao; t[0].z += h; t[3].z += h
        end
        t
      end

      def draw_roof_preview(view, rect)
        t = calcular_topo(rect)
        b = rect[:corners]
        view.draw(GL_LINE_LOOP, t)
        4.times { |i| view.draw(GL_LINES, [b[i], t[i]]) }
      end

      def criar_telhado(rect)
        c    = rect[:corners]
        tops = calcular_topo(rect)
        all  = c + tops
        center = Geom::Point3d.new(
          all.sum(&:x)/8.0, all.sum(&:y)/8.0, all.sum(&:z)/8.0
        )

        model = Sketchup.active_model
        model.start_operation(RoofMaster.obter_texto(:op_meia_agua), true)
        grp = model.active_entities.add_group
        grp.name = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:bim_meia_agua)
        ents = grp.entities

        add_base_face(ents, c)
        ft = add_face_safe(ents, tops)
        ft.reverse! if ft && ft.normal.z < 0

        4.times do |i|
          j    = (i + 1) % 4
          pts  = [c[i], c[j], tops[j], tops[i]]
          uniq = pts.chunk_while { |a, b| a.distance(b) < 1e-6 }.map(&:first)
          add_face_outward(ents, uniq, center) if uniq.length >= 3
        end

        finalizar_solido(grp)
        model.commit_operation
      end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # TELHADO QUATRO AGUAS (Hip)
    # ==========================================================
    class TelhadoQuatroAguasTool < Base3PtRoofTool

      def update_status
        chaves = %i[status_quatro_aguas_p1 status_quatro_aguas_p2 status_quatro_aguas_p3]
        Sketchup.set_status_text(RoofMaster.obter_texto(chaves[@estado]))
      end

      # length >= width -> cume paralelo a v_len; ap1 perto c0/c3, ap2 perto c1/c2
      # width  >  length -> cume paralelo a v_perp; ap1 perto c0/c1, ap2 perto c3/c2
      def calcular_cume(rect)
        c      = rect[:corners]
        length = rect[:length]
        width  = rect[:width]
        v_len  = rect[:v_len]
        v_perp = rect[:v_perp]
        cx     = (c[0].x + c[2].x) / 2.0
        cy     = (c[0].y + c[2].y) / 2.0
        z      = c[0].z

        if length >= width
          h    = (width  / 2.0) * @inclinacao
          half = (length - width) / 2.0
          ap1  = Geom::Point3d.new(cx - v_len.x*half,  cy - v_len.y*half,  z+h)
          ap2  = Geom::Point3d.new(cx + v_len.x*half,  cy + v_len.y*half,  z+h)
        else
          h    = (length / 2.0) * @inclinacao
          half = (width  - length) / 2.0
          ap1  = Geom::Point3d.new(cx - v_perp.x*half, cy - v_perp.y*half, z+h)
          ap2  = Geom::Point3d.new(cx + v_perp.x*half, cy + v_perp.y*half, z+h)
        end
        [ap1, ap2]
      end

      def draw_roof_preview(view, rect)
        ap1, ap2 = calcular_cume(rect)
        c        = rect[:corners]
        view.draw(GL_LINES, [ap1, ap2])
        c.each { |pt| view.draw(GL_LINES, [pt, ap1]); view.draw(GL_LINES, [pt, ap2]) }
      end

      def criar_telhado(rect)
        c        = rect[:corners]
        length   = rect[:length]
        width    = rect[:width]
        ap1, ap2 = calcular_cume(rect)
        center   = Geom::Point3d.new(
          (c[0].x+c[2].x)/2.0, (c[0].y+c[2].y)/2.0,
          c[0].z + (ap1.z - c[0].z) / 2.0
        )

        model = Sketchup.active_model
        model.start_operation(RoofMaster.obter_texto(:op_quatro_aguas), true)
        grp = model.active_entities.add_group
        grp.name = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:bim_quatro_aguas)
        ents = grp.entities

        add_base_face(ents, c)

        if length >= width
          # ap1 perto c0, ap2 perto c1
          # Frente/costas = trapezios; laterais = triangulos
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], c[1], ap2, ap1], center)  # frente  (v_perp-)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[3], ap1, ap2, c[2]], center)  # costas  (v_perp+)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], ap1, c[3]],      center)  # lateral esq (v_len-)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[1], c[2], ap2],      center)  # lateral dir (v_len+)
        else
          # ap1 perto c0/c1, ap2 perto c3/c2
          # Frente/costas = triangulos; laterais = trapezios
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], c[1], ap1],      center)  # frente  (v_len-)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[3], ap2, c[2]],      center)  # costas  (v_len+)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[0], ap1, ap2, c[3]], center)  # lateral esq (v_perp-)
          add_face_outward(ents, [c[1], c[2], ap2, ap1], center)  # lateral dir (v_perp+)
        end

        finalizar_solido(grp)
        model.commit_operation
      end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # TRAMA DO TELHADO
    # ==========================================================
    class TramaTool
      COLOR_FACE_HL = Sketchup::Color.new(0, 0, 255, 60)
      COLOR_EDGE_HL = Sketchup::Color.new(255, 0, 0)

      def initialize
        @model          = Sketchup.active_model
        @state          = 0
        @selected_face  = nil
        @face_trans     = nil
        @ref_edge       = nil
        @edge_vector    = nil
        @edge_length    = 0.0
        @user_spacing   = 50.cm
        @user_height    = 20.cm
        @user_thickness = 5.cm
        @real_spacing   = 0.0
        @divisions      = 1
        @ip             = Sketchup::InputPoint.new
      end

      def activate;   update_status; end
      def enableVCB?; true; end

      def calculate_divisions
        return unless @edge_length > 0 && @user_spacing > 0
        @divisions    = [(@edge_length / @user_spacing.to_f).round, 1].max
        @real_spacing = @edge_length / @divisions.to_f
      end

      def onMouseMove(flags, x, y, view)
        @ip.pick(view, x, y)
        view.tooltip = @ip.tooltip if @ip.valid?
        view.invalidate
      end

      def onLButtonDown(flags, x, y, view)
        case @state
        when 0
          if @ip.valid? && @ip.face
            @selected_face = @ip.face
            @face_trans    = @ip.transformation
            @state         = 1
            @model.selection.clear
          else
            UI.beep
          end
        when 1
          clicked = @ip.edge
          if clicked && @selected_face.edges.include?(clicked)
            @ref_edge    = clicked
            ps           = clicked.start.position.transform(@face_trans)
            pe           = clicked.end.position.transform(@face_trans)
            vec          = pe - ps
            @edge_length = vec.length
            @edge_vector = vec.normalize
            calculate_divisions
            if show_options_dialog
              create_thick_geometry
              reset_tool
            end
          else
            UI.beep
            Sketchup.status_text = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:error_select_edge)
          end
        end
        update_status
        view.invalidate
      end

      def show_options_dialog
        prompts  = [
          RoofMaster.obter_texto(:dialog_trama_spacing),
          RoofMaster.obter_texto(:dialog_trama_height),
          RoofMaster.obter_texto(:dialog_trama_thick)
        ]
        defaults = [@user_spacing, @user_height, @user_thickness]
        input    = UI.inputbox(prompts, defaults, RoofMaster.obter_texto(:dialog_trama_title))
        return false unless input
        @user_spacing, @user_height, @user_thickness = input
        calculate_divisions
        true
      end

      def onKeyDown(key, repeat, flags, view)
        reset_tool if key == 27
        view.invalidate
      end

      def create_thick_geometry
        @model.start_operation(RoofMaster.obter_texto(:op_trama), true)
        ents = @model.active_entities

        # Face temporaria para interseccao
        tmp_grp  = ents.add_group
        g_pts    = @selected_face.outer_loop.vertices.map { |v| v.position.transform(@face_trans) }
        tmp_face = tmp_grp.entities.add_face(g_pts)
        orig_n   = @selected_face.normal.transform(@face_trans)
        tmp_face.reverse! if tmp_face.normal.dot(orig_n) < 0

        face_normal   = tmp_face.normal
        cut_direction = (@edge_vector * face_normal).normalize
        diag          = tmp_face.bounds.diagonal * 5.0

        vec_up   = face_normal.clone;         vec_up.length   = diag
        vec_down = face_normal.reverse.clone; vec_down.length = diag
        vec_fwd  = cut_direction.clone;       vec_fwd.length  = diag
        vec_back = cut_direction.reverse;     vec_back.length = diag

        # Laminas de corte
        blade_grp    = ents.add_group
        p_start_edge = @ref_edge.start.position.transform(@face_trans)

        (1..@divisions - 1).each do |i|
          ctr = p_start_edge.offset(@edge_vector, @real_spacing * i)
          blade_grp.entities.add_face(
            ctr + vec_back + vec_up,
            ctr + vec_fwd  + vec_up,
            ctr + vec_fwd  + vec_down,
            ctr + vec_back + vec_down
          )
        end

        lines_grp = ents.add_group
        blade_grp.entities.intersect_with(
          true, blade_grp.transformation,
          lines_grp.entities, lines_grp.transformation.inverse,
          true, tmp_face
        )
        blade_grp.erase!
        tmp_grp.erase!

        if lines_grp.entities.count == 0
          lines_grp.erase!
          UI.messagebox(RoofMaster.obter_texto(:error_invalid_geom))
          @model.commit_operation
          return
        end

        final_grp      = ents.add_group
        final_grp.name = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:bim_trama_master)
        half_thick     = @user_thickness / 2.0

        lines_grp.entities.grep(Sketchup::Edge).each do |edge|
          v_line = edge.start.position.vector_to(edge.end.position)
          next unless v_line.valid?

          v_off        = (v_line * face_normal).normalize
          v_off.length = half_thick
          ps, pe       = edge.start.position, edge.end.position

          beam_grp      = final_grp.entities.add_group
          beam_grp.name = RoofMaster.obter_texto(:bim_trama_viga)
          bf = beam_grp.entities.add_face(
            ps + v_off, ps - v_off, pe - v_off, pe + v_off
          )
          if bf
            bf.reverse! if bf.normal.dot(face_normal) < 0
            bf.pushpull(@user_height)
          end
        end

        lines_grp.erase!
        @model.selection.clear
        @model.selection.add(final_grp)
        @model.commit_operation
      end

      def reset_tool
        @state = 0; @selected_face = nil; @face_trans = nil; @ref_edge = nil
        update_status
      end

      def draw(view)
        @ip.draw(view) if @ip.valid?

        if @selected_face&.valid?
          pts = @selected_face.outer_loop.vertices.map { |v| v.position.transform(@face_trans) }
          view.drawing_color = COLOR_FACE_HL
          view.draw(GL_POLYGON, pts)
        end

        if @state == 1
          curr = @ip.edge
          if curr && @selected_face&.edges&.include?(curr)
            p1 = curr.start.position.transform(@face_trans)
            p2 = curr.end.position.transform(@face_trans)
            view.line_width    = 5
            view.drawing_color = COLOR_EDGE_HL
            view.draw(GL_LINES, p1, p2)
            divs = [(p1.distance(p2) / @user_spacing.to_f).round, 1].max
            view.draw_text(@ip.position,
              RoofMaster.obter_texto(:draw_divisions) % { divs: divs })
          end
        end
      end

      def update_status
        Sketchup.status_text = RoofMaster.obter_texto(
          @state == 0 ? :status_trama_face : :status_trama_edge
        )
        Sketchup.vcb_value = @user_spacing
      end
    end

    # ==========================================================
    # EXECUCAO PRINCIPAL
    # ==========================================================
    def self.executar
      if @dialog&.visible?
        @dialog.bring_to_front
        return
      end

      @dialog = UI::HtmlDialog.new(
        dialog_title: obter_texto(:html_title),
        scrollable:   false,
        resizable:    true,
        width:        360,
        height:       610,
        style:        UI::HtmlDialog::STYLE_DIALOG
      )

      @dialog.set_html(build_html)

      @dialog.add_action_callback('execute_tool') do |_ctx, type, slope|
        inc   = slope.to_f
        model = Sketchup.active_model
        case type
        when 'meia'   then model.select_tool(TelhadoUmaAguaTool.new(inc))
        when 'duas'   then model.select_tool(TelhadoDuasAguasTool.new(inc))
        when 'quatro' then model.select_tool(TelhadoQuatroAguasTool.new(inc))
        when 'trama'  then model.select_tool(TramaTool.new)
        end
      end

      @dialog.show
    end

    # HTML em metodo proprio para melhor legibilidade
    def self.build_html
      lang = Sketchup.get_locale.split('-')[0]
      <<~HTML
        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="#{lang}">
        <head>
          <meta charset="UTF-8">
          <style>
            :root {
              --primary: #2563eb;
              --bg:      #f8f9fa;
              --card:    #ffffff;
              --text:    #1f2937;
              --border:  #e5e7eb;
            }
            *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
            html, body {
              width: 100%; height: 100%;
              margin: 0; padding: 0;
              font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
              background: var(--bg); color: var(--text);
              user-select: none;
            }
            body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; }

            .header {
              flex-shrink: 0;
              background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a8a, var(--primary));
              color: white; padding: 16px; text-align: center;
              font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 2.5vw, 1.3rem);
              font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
              box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
            }

            .content {
              flex: 1 1 auto; overflow-y: auto;
              padding: clamp(10px, 3%, 20px);
              display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0;
            }

            .input-box {
              flex-shrink: 0;
              background: var(--card);
              padding: clamp(10px,2%,18px) clamp(12px,3%,20px);
              border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
              box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
              display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
              margin-bottom: clamp(10px,2%,18px);
            }
            .input-box label { font-weight: 600; font-size: clamp(0.8rem,2vw,0.95rem); }
            .input-wrapper {
              display: flex; align-items: center;
              background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
              border-radius: 8px; padding: 4px 12px;
            }
            .input-wrapper input {
              width: 50px; border: none; background: transparent;
              font-size: clamp(0.95rem,2vw,1.1rem); font-weight: 600;
              text-align: center; outline: none; color: var(--primary);
            }
            .input-wrapper span { font-weight: 600; color: #6b7280; margin-left: 4px; }

            .hint {
              flex-shrink: 0;
              font-size: clamp(0.65rem,1.8vw,0.75rem); color: #6b7280;
              text-align: center; margin-bottom: clamp(8px,2%,14px);
              padding: 5px 10px; background: #eff6ff;
              border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            }

            .grid {
              flex: 1 1 auto;
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
              gap: clamp(8px,2%,14px);
              align-content: start;
            }

            .card {
              background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
              border-radius: 12px; padding: clamp(10px,2%,16px);
              cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center;
              gap: clamp(10px,3%,18px); transition: all .2s ease;
            }
            .card:hover {
              transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: var(--primary);
              box-shadow: 0 8px 15px -3px rgba(37,99,235,.15);
            }

            .icon {
              flex-shrink: 0;
              width: clamp(36px,8%,48px); height: clamp(36px,8%,48px);
              background: #eff6ff; border-radius: 10px;
              display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
              color: var(--primary);
            }
            .icon svg { width: 60%; height: 60%; }

            .info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; }
            .title {
              font-weight: 600; font-size: clamp(0.85rem,2vw,1.05rem);
              margin-bottom: 3px; white-space: nowrap;
              overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
            }
            .desc { font-size: clamp(0.7rem,1.6vw,0.8rem); color: #6b7280; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>
          <div class="header">#{obter_texto(:html_select_tool)}</div>
          <div class="content">

            <div class="input-box">
              <label>#{obter_texto(:html_slope_label)}</label>
              <div class="input-wrapper">
                <input type="number" id="slope" value="35" min="5" max="200">
                <span>#{obter_texto(:html_slope_unit)}</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="hint">📌 #{obter_texto(:html_hint)}</div>

            <div class="grid">

              <div class="card" onclick="go('meia')">
                <div class="icon">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                       stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                    <polygon points="4 20 20 20 20 8 4 16"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="info">
                  <div class="title">#{obter_texto(:html_meia_title)}</div>
                  <div class="desc">#{obter_texto(:html_meia_desc)}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="card" onclick="go('duas')">
                <div class="icon">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                       stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                    <path d="M3 20h18M12 4L3 14h18L12 4z"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="info">
                  <div class="title">#{obter_texto(:html_duas_title)}</div>
                  <div class="desc">#{obter_texto(:html_duas_desc)}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="card" onclick="go('quatro')">
                <div class="icon">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                       stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                    <path d="M2 20h20L18 8H6L2 20z"/>
                    <path d="M6 8L12 3L18 8"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="info">
                  <div class="title">#{obter_texto(:html_quatro_title)}</div>
                  <div class="desc">#{obter_texto(:html_quatro_desc)}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="card" onclick="go('trama')">
                <div class="icon">
                  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                       stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                    <rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2" ry="2"/>
                    <line x1="3"  y1="9"  x2="21" y2="9"/>
                    <line x1="3"  y1="15" x2="21" y2="15"/>
                    <line x1="9"  y1="3"  x2="9"  y2="21"/>
                    <line x1="15" y1="3"  x2="15" y2="21"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="info">
                  <div class="title">#{obter_texto(:html_trama_title)}</div>
                  <div class="desc">#{obter_texto(:html_trama_desc)}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

            </div>
          </div>

          <script>
            function go(type) {
              sketchup.execute_tool(type, document.getElementById('slope').value);
            }
          </script>
        </body>
        </html>
      HTML
    end

  end # module RoofMaster
end   # module ScriptUpComunidade

ScriptUpComunidade::RoofMaster.executar
